title: OS X - Microsoft Office 2016 Visual Installation Guide
body: Use this link to go to the M365 Apps page . Click the blue button in the upper right-hand corner that says Install apps . You will be taken to a new page where you will then select the button in the upper left quadrant labeled Install Office . Follow any prompts that may come up in order to complete the installation. After installing, open the Word application and sign in. You must use your @wisc.edu address. Once you've entered your Wisc email address, you will be redirected to the standard NetID login page. Log in with your credentials to complete the registration.
